---
title: "CV"
---

::: {.cv-page-header}
::: {.cv-page-left}
## Curriculum Vitae

::: {.cv-page-subtitle}
A concise overview of my academic background, internship experience, technical skills, and professional development.
:::

[Download CV PDF](cv.pdf){.primary-btn target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.cv-page-right}
**Sophia Sufei Chen**  
Final Year Business Studies Student  
Dublin City University  

**Specialisation:** Business Analytics & Marketing Planning  
**Email:** [chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie](mailto:chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie)  
**LinkedIn:** [Sophia Sufei Chen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233)  
**Location:** Dublin, Ireland
:::
:::

::: {.cv-highlights}
::: {.cv-highlight-item}
### Final Year
Business Studies Student
:::

::: {.cv-highlight-item}
### Focus
Business Analytics & Marketing Planning
:::

::: {.cv-highlight-item}
### ACCA
In Progress
:::

::: {.cv-highlight-item}
### Internship
Accounting Assistant Intern
:::
:::


## Education

::: {.cv-block}
### Dublin City University

**Business Studies**  
Final Year Student  
Specialising in **Business Analytics** and **Marketing Planning**

**Expected Graduation:** 2026

My degree has provided me with a strong academic foundation in business analysis, decision-making, marketing, and accounting-related study. It has also helped me build confidence in structured problem-solving, analytical thinking, and professional communication.
:::

## Professional Experience

::: {.cv-block}
### Accounting Assistant Intern — PTB Accounting LTD

I am currently working as an Accounting Assistant Intern, where I support day-to-day accounting and administrative tasks. This role is helping me gain practical experience in financial documentation, organisation, and business operations.

Through this internship, I have strengthened my attention to detail, workplace communication, responsibility, and understanding of professional office processes. It has also helped me connect academic knowledge with practical business experience.
:::

## Technical and Professional Skills

::: {.cv-skill-columns}
::: {.cv-block}
### Technical Skills
- Excel
- SQL
- Python
- Jamovi
- Power BI
- Word
- PowerPoint
- Xero
:::

::: {.cv-block}
### Professional Skills
- Communication
- Teamwork
- Organisation
- Time management
- Multitasking
- Problem-solving
- Professional presentation
- Analytical thinking
:::
:::

## Certifications and Development

::: {.cv-skill-columns}
::: {.cv-block}
### ACCA
I am currently pursuing ACCA as part of my professional development. This is strengthening my understanding of accounting, finance, and professional practice, while supporting my long-term readiness for finance-related and business support roles.
:::

::: {.cv-block}
### Continuous Learning
Alongside my university studies, I continue to develop practical skills through independent online learning, portfolio work, and digital training in analytics, business software, and communication.
:::
:::

## Portfolio Relevance

::: {.cv-block}
My portfolio includes project work in:

- Market and business analysis
- Dashboard and visual reporting
- Quantitative risk analysis
- Structured Excel and data work
- Professional communication and presentation

[Open Portfolio](projects/index.html){.secondary-btn}
:::
